div.style: display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; padding: 24px 32px 16px; border-bottom: 3px solid #C0392B;
width:120px; height:55px; background:#1C2B4A; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
position:fixed; bottom:0; right:0; width:90px; height:90px; overflow:hidden; pointer-events:none;

img.style: width:180px; height:130px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #E8EAED;

div.style: flex:1; background:#F5F6F8; border-radius:6px; padding:14px 16px; border:1px solid #E8EAED;

t.t-foreach: [ ('Área', str(doc.area or 0) + ' m²'), ('Habitaciones', str(doc.bedrooms or 0)), ('Baños', str(doc.bathrooms or 0)), ('Parqueaderos', str(doc.parking_spaces or 0)), ('Piso', str(doc.floor) if doc.floor else '—'), ('Año construc.', str(doc.year_built) if doc.year_built else '—'), ]

div.style: flex:1; background:#F5F6F8; border:1px solid #E8EAED; border-radius:6px; padding:10px 14px;
flex:1; background:#F5F6F8; border:1px solid #E8EAED; border-radius:6px; padding:10px 14px;

img.style: width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:50%; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid #1C2B4A;

div.style: font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; color:#2C3E50; position:relative; min-height:270mm; padding-bottom:40px;
display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; padding:24px 32px 14px; border-bottom:3px solid #C0392B;
width:110px; height:50px; background:#1C2B4A; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:8px 32px; border-top:1px solid #E8EAED; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:9px; color:#95A5A6; background:white;
position:fixed; bottom:0; right:0; width:80px; height:80px; overflow:hidden;
position:absolute; bottom:-18px; right:-18px; width:70px; height:70px; background:#1C2B4A; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.9;
position:absolute; bottom:-28px; right:18px; width:55px; height:55px; background:#C0392B; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.8;
font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; color:#2C3E50; position:relative; min-height:270mm; padding-bottom:40px;
display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; padding:24px 32px 14px; border-bottom:3px solid #C0392B;
width:110px; height:50px; background:#1C2B4A; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:8px 32px; border-top:1px solid #E8EAED; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:9px; color:#95A5A6; background:white;
position:fixed; bottom:0; right:0; width:80px; height:80px; overflow:hidden;
position:absolute; bottom:-18px; right:-18px; width:70px; height:70px; background:#1C2B4A; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.9;
position:absolute; bottom:-28px; right:18px; width:55px; height:55px; background:#C0392B; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.8;
font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; color:#2C3E50; position:relative; min-height:270mm; padding-bottom:40px;
display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; padding:24px 32px 14px; border-bottom:3px solid #C0392B;
width:110px; height:50px; background:#1C2B4A; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
background:#F5F6F8; border:1px solid #E8EAED; border-radius:6px; padding:12px 16px; margin-bottom:16px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;

img.style: width:50px; height:50px; border-radius:50%; object-fit:cover; border:2px solid #1C2B4A;

span.t-att-style: 'font-size:9px; font-weight:700; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:10px; ' + ('background:#D5F5E3; color:#27AE60;' if c.state == 'paid' else ('background:#FDEBD0; color:#E67E22;' if c.state == 'approved' else 'background:#F5F6F8; color:#7F8C8D;'))

div.style: position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:8px 32px; border-top:1px solid #E8EAED; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:9px; color:#95A5A6; background:white;
position:fixed; bottom:0; right:0; width:80px; height:80px; overflow:hidden;
position:absolute; bottom:-18px; right:-18px; width:70px; height:70px; background:#1C2B4A; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.9;
position:absolute; bottom:-28px; right:18px; width:55px; height:55px; background:#C0392B; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.8;
font-family:'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif; color:#2C3E50; position:relative; min-height:270mm; padding-bottom:40px;
display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; padding:24px 32px 14px; border-bottom:3px solid #C0392B;
width:110px; height:50px; background:#1C2B4A; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

t.t-esc: rec.client_id.name if hasattr(rec,'client_id') else rec.partner_id.name if hasattr(rec,'partner_id') else '—'

div.style: position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:8px 32px; border-top:1px solid #E8EAED; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:9px; color:#95A5A6; background:white;
position:fixed; bottom:0; right:0; width:80px; height:80px; overflow:hidden;
position:absolute; bottom:-18px; right:-18px; width:70px; height:70px; background:#1C2B4A; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.9;
position:absolute; bottom:-28px; right:18px; width:55px; height:55px; background:#C0392B; transform:rotate(45deg); opacity:0.8;
